features.description: Onboard batch 7 song: the-giant-piece-of-shit. MP3 at public/audio/the-giant-piece-of-shit.mp3, cover at public/covers/the-giant-piece-of-shit.jpg. (1) Read content/songs/batch7/lyrics/the-giant-piece-of-shit.md for metadata (Title, Album, Source, Genre, Mood, Tags, Concept, Key Insight, Key Quote, Quote Speaker, Story Behind) and full lyrics text. (2) Read content/songs/batch7/research/the-giant-piece-of-shit.md for additional context. (3) Read content/songs/batch7/annotations/the-giant-piece-of-shit.json for pre-written annotations. (4) Find the correct album tracks array in lib/albums.ts by matching the Album field from lyrics metadata (e.g. 'The Craft' → theCraftTracks). (5) Add the track object to that array. Fields: slug, title, albumSlug, trackNumber (next number in that album), duration '3:00', audioUrl '/audio/the-giant-piece-of-shit.mp3', coverImage '/covers/the-giant-piece-of-shit.jpg', genre, mood, lyrics (full lyrics without metadata/headers — just the song lines), concept, keyInsight, sources [{title, type, url, guest}], keyQuote, quoteSpeaker, storyBehind, tags, annotations (from JSON), releaseDate '2026-03-24'. DONE: Track appears in lib/albums.ts. DO NOT TOUCH: existing tracks. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Add track to correct album array in lib/albums.ts

Onboard batch 7.5 song: coding-is-solved. MP3 at public/audio/coding-is-solved.mp3, cover at public/covers/coding-is-solved.jpg. (1) Read content/songs/batch7.5/lyrics/coding-is-solved.md for metadata and lyrics. (2) Read content/songs/batch7.5/research/coding-is-solved.md if it exists. (3) NO pre-written annotations — use mcp__lennysdata__search_content to find the source episode/article, then mcp__lennysdata__read_excerpt for quotes. Write 3-5 annotations: {lyricText (exact substring from lyrics), note (2-3 sentences connecting lyric to Lenny content), sourceTitle, sourceUrl}. (4) Add track to correct album in lib/albums.ts. Map album from metadata — AI/coding songs go to 'electric-dreams' (electricDreamsTracks). DONE: Track in lib/albums.ts with annotations. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

QA Round 1 — PM Persona audit. Pretend you are Sarah, senior PM, Lenny podcast listener. 5 minutes to explore. Read app/page.tsx, app/album/[slug]/AlbumPageClient.tsx, app/track/[slug]/TrackPageClient.tsx, app/songs/page.tsx, components/NowPlayingBar.tsx, components/SyncedLyrics.tsx, components/TrackRow.tsx, components/VoteButtons.tsx, components/OnboardingTooltips.tsx, components/KeyboardShortcuts.tsx, components/ThemeToggle.tsx. Write content/qa/round1-pm-audit.md: First Impressions, Navigation Flow, Content Quality, Search Experience, Top 5 Issues ranked by impact. Be brutally honest. DONE: Audit file exists. DO NOT TOUCH: code. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Fix issue #1 from Round 1 PM audit. Read content/qa/round1-pm-audit.md. Find the #1 ranked issue. Read the relevant file(s). Make the minimal code fix. DONE: Issue #1 resolved. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
Fix issue #2 from Round 1 PM audit. Read content/qa/round1-pm-audit.md. Find the #2 ranked issue. Fix it. DONE: Issue #2 resolved. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
Fix issue #3 from Round 1 PM audit. Read content/qa/round1-pm-audit.md. Find the #3 ranked issue. Fix it. DONE: Issue #3 resolved. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Annotation quality audit. Read lib/albums.ts. For EVERY track that has an annotations array, verify: (1) each lyricText substring exists in that track's lyrics field, (2) note is specific/factual not vague/generic, (3) annotation doesn't feel force-fit. Write content/qa/annotation-audit.md: one section per album, each track with verdict GOOD/NEEDS_WORK/FORCE_FIT. For FORCE_FIT, explain why and suggest fix. DONE: Audit exists. DO NOT TOUCH: code. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Fix FORCE_FIT annotations. Read content/qa/annotation-audit.md. For each FORCE_FIT annotation: find a better lyric line, rewrite the note to be more specific, or remove it. Use mcp__lennysdata__search_content to verify facts. Every annotation must feel like a natural Genius-style insight. DONE: No force-fit annotations remain. VERIFY: pnpm build passes. Each lyricText still in lyrics.

QA Round 2 — Contest Judge Persona. You are judging Lenny's contest. Criteria: creativity, technical polish, faithfulness to source content, shareability. Read all page and component files again (they changed from Round 1 fixes). Write content/qa/round2-judge-audit.md: Wow Factor (1-10), Faithfulness (1-10), Polish (1-10), Top 3 Winning Qualities, Top 3 Things Holding It Back, What Would Make This Unbeatable, Verdict. DONE: Audit exists. DO NOT TOUCH: code. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
Fix top issue from Round 2 judge audit. Read content/qa/round2-judge-audit.md 'Top 3 Things Holding It Back'. Fix the #1 code-fixable issue. DONE: Fixed. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
Fix second issue from Round 2 judge audit. Read content/qa/round2-judge-audit.md. Fix the #2 code-fixable issue from 'Top 3 Things Holding It Back'. DONE: Fixed. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

QA Round 3 — Lenny Himself. You are Lenny Rachitsky. Does this represent your content well? Would you share it? Read lib/albums.ts thoroughly. Spot-check 5 tracks using mcp__lennysdata__search_content to verify sources, quotes, and attributions are accurate. Write content/qa/round3-lenny-audit.md: What Makes Lenny Smile, Accuracy Issues (specific tracks + what's wrong), Missing Topics, Misrepresentations, Overall Verdict. DONE: Audit exists. DO NOT TOUCH: code. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

Fix accuracy issues from Lenny audit. Read content/qa/round3-lenny-audit.md. For each specific accuracy issue (wrong source, misattribution, wrong quote): verify with mcp__lennysdata__search_content and mcp__lennysdata__read_excerpt, then fix in lib/albums.ts. Only fix clearly wrong facts. DONE: Accuracy issues resolved. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.

QA Round 4 — Mobile User. You are Jamie on a phone during commute. Read all components looking for: hidden sm: classes (what's hidden on mobile?), touch targets under 44px, text truncation issues, layout problems on narrow screens. Write content/qa/round4-mobile-audit.md: Hidden on Mobile (list everything hidden), Touch Target Issues, Truncation/Overflow, Layout Concerns, Top 5 Mobile Issues ranked. DONE: Audit exists. DO NOT TOUCH: code. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
steps: Read all components for responsive classes

features.description: Fix top 2 mobile issues from Round 4. Read content/qa/round4-mobile-audit.md. Fix #1 and #2 mobile issues. Common fixes: increase touch targets, show hidden elements on mobile, fix truncation. DONE: Top 2 fixed. VERIFY: pnpm build passes.
